narrative:
Jackson Twp township has 845 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.6 percentage points.
